mapper.select: SELECT * FROM borrowrec WHERE sno = #{sno} AND retStatus = '未归还'
SELECT * FROM borrowrec WHERE barCode = #{barCode} AND retStatus = '未归还'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrowrec (sno, barCode, borDate, retDate, realRetDate, retStatus, ovdDays, fineMoney, paySerNum , fineStatus) VALUES (#{sno}, #{barCode}, #{borDate}, #{retDate}, #{realRetDate}, #{retStatus.status}, #{ovdDays}, #{fineMoney}, #{paySerNum} , #{fineStatus.status})
mapper.update: UPDATE borrowrec SET sno = #{sno}, barCode = #{barCode}, borDate = #{borDate}, retDate = #{retDate}, realRetDate = #{realRetDate}, retStatus = #{retStatus.status}, ovdDays = #{ovdDays}, fineMoney = #{fineMoney}, fineStatus = #{fineStatus.status}, paySerNum = #{paySerNum} WHERE serNum = #{serNum}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrowrec WHERE sno = #{sno} AND retStatus = '未归还'
SELECT * FROM borrowrec WHERE sno = #{sno} AND fineStatus = '未缴' AND fineMoney > 0
SELECT * FROM borrowrec WHERE sno = #{sno} ORDER BY borDate DESC
